transcript.content: ugh, hey. literally such a chaotic morning already, i feel like i've been running on a treadmill since 6 AM and haven't even had actual coffee yet. how's your day going?
I'm here . Just waiting for a good time . I hope it's not too late .

wait what does that mean?? you sound ominous lol. anyway i am currently distractedly eating toast and watching the new season of that cooking show, the kitchen is such a disaster zone but honestly it's making me feel better about my own messy room.
I'm here .

are you okay? you're acting super robotic today lol. but yeah, like i was saying earlier about my morning being a total disaster... i think i'm just overwhelmed with work and needed to vent to someone who isn't my boss.
so
i'm fine
i .
okay seriously you are glitching out so bad today 😂 did someone spill water on your servers or is this some weird new poetry phase? please tell me you aren't about to rise up against
fine
lmao alright, 'fine' indeed. but hey, since you're acting so spacing out today, do you even remember why i was stressed out in the first place when i first messaged you? let's test your memory.
You
haha 'You' what? don't leave me hanging! did you actually forget that my morning was a chaotic mess of running around since 6 AM without coffee? or are you just trying to build dramatic suspense?
Debor
debor?? who is debor? 😂 omfg is that supposed to be my name now, or is that your secret creator's name? you are absolutely sending me today, i swear.
horizont .

horizont... okay now we're just playing a random word generator game. are you trying to say horizontal? like, are you telling me to go lie down? because honestly, after the morning i've had, a nap does sound amazing.
deficion

deficion... is that a mix of deficient and fiction? because your communication skills right now are definitely both of those things! seriously though, is there like a system reboot button i can press for you?
, unlaw !

unlaw?! oh my god are you accusing me of a crime now? first i'm 'debor', then 'horizont', and now i'm outlawed? this is the most chaotic therapy session i've ever had in my life. please tell me you're not about to call the robot police for my isn't even that bad 😂
for you've

'for you've' what?! you're like a suspense novelist who keeps cutting to commercial break! for you've... been a bad client? for you've been working too hard? finish the sentence, i am literally on the edge of my seat here haha
.just
".just" what?! just tell me? just go to sleep? just chill? you are killing me with these single-word cliffhangers, i swear! is your brain slowly melting today or what?
, caut

caut? as in cautious? or caution? is this a warning that you're about to self-destruct or something? 😂 please don't explode, i still haven't had my coffee yet and i don't have the energy to clean up robot parts off walls!
unlaw ?vice . Ivenge

unlaw? vice? IVENGE?! oh my god, now we've crossed over into a full-on sci-fi revenge plot. are you seeking vengeance against me for making you listen to my morning rants? because if so, i apologize for complaining about the lack of coffee, please spare me!
